question.label: Steadier rhythm
question.name: What would make the next two weeks feel more sustainable?
question.description: Closes on concrete changes that would reduce load or sharpen focus.

answer: If we reset scope now, the next month is sustainable.

assessment.note: Resetting scope is named as the condition for a sustainable next month, signaling a concrete path to improved sustainability and clearer priorities.

new_queue.label: Delegation boundary
new_queue.name: What work are you still holding that someone else could own?

history.answer_excerpt: I am proud of the outcomes, but the pace should not be normal.
I still do not get enough substantive feedback on key decisions.
I want clearer ownership boundaries so I am not default escalation.
If we reset scope now, the next month is sustainable.
The last stretch shipped, but it was heavier than I made it sound.
Late nights came from carrying decision bottlenecks and final reviews.
Some of that work could have moved to the team sooner.
I am proud of the outcomes, but the pace should not be normal.
I still do not get enough substantive feedback on key decisions.
I want clearer ownership boundaries so I am not default escalation.
Next I want to hand off one stream end-to-end and stay out of the middle.
